input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation commonly demonstrates YAML/JSON/HOCON/TOML configuration files, but those formats require separate hoplite-* format modules. For hoplite-core tests, use MapPropertySource or built-in .properties support unless intentionally adding coverage for another module.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra deterministic setup is required for hoplite-core. The resolved artifact only depends on Kotlin stdlib/reflect and kotlinx-coroutines, and core coverage is reachable through built-in MapPropertySource, environment/system-property sources, and the built-in .properties parser without Docker, external services, or additional test dependencies.
